stories.headline: Two killed in Oman by drones, several also fired at Saudi Arabia
stories.description: Two drones target Oman’s Sohar province, killing two foreign nationals and injuring others, state news agency reports.

stories.headline: US KC-135 refuelling plane crashes in Iraq, military says
stories.description: The US Central Command says rescue efforts are under way after a refuelling aircraft went down over western Iraq.

stories.headline: Israel attacks Beirut in ‘targeted killing’ attempt, kills several in south
stories.description: Israel’s attacks in Lebanon are striking areas in Beirut not hit in this conflict, nor during the 2024 war.

stories.headline: Poor in an oil-rich country: Republic of Congo’s youth hope for change
stories.description: In an oil-producing country where 60 percent of people are under 25, nearly half the population lives in poverty.

stories.headline: UK economy failed to grow in January, figures show
stories.description: Analysts had been expecting 0.2% growth for the UK economy at the beginning of the year.
